nodes.name: 安蒂奥基亚省

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It is found in central and eastern Panama, on the Caribbean slope in the Canal area, on both slopes in eastern Panamá Province, and in the Pacific lowlands in Darién Province. Its range continues south on the Pacific slope of Colombia's Western Andes at least to southern Chocó Department. One source shows its range in the country continuing all the way to Ecuador.{{cite book | last1 =McMullan | first1 =Miles | last2 =Donegan | first2 =Thomas M

links.evidence: These include humid evergreen forest, dryer deciduous forest, gallery forest, and secondary forest. It also is found in clearings and arid scrublands that have tall trees. In elevation it overall is mostly found from sea level to . It reaches in Colombia, in Ecuador, in Peru, and in Venezuela
